# clo_compute_snapshot (Resource)

Take a point-in-time snapshot of a server. Snapshots are stored as private images and auto-expire at `deleted_in`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A point-in-time snapshot of a server. Snapshots are stored as private images
# and auto-expire at their deleted_in timestamp.
resource "clo_compute_snapshot" "nightly" {
  server_id = clo_compute_instance.test-server.id
  name      = "nightly"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the snapshot
- `server_id` (String) ID of the server to snapshot

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `child_servers` (List of String) IDs of servers provisioned from this snapshot
- `created_in` (String) Timestamp the snapshot was created
- `deleted_in` (String) Timestamp the snapshot is scheduled to be auto-deleted
- `id` (String) ID of the snapshot
- `parent_server` (String) ID of the server the snapshot was taken from
- `size` (Number) Snapshot size in bytes
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status of the snapshot

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `read` (String)
